hero.subtitle: Experts in corporate, immigration, and real estate law for international investors and companies.

whycr.title: Why Costa Rica?
whycr.intro: 51,000 km² of nature, two oceans, and Latin America's most enduring democracy.
whycr.card1_text: A bridge between two continents, bathed by two oceans — Costa Rica is home to more than 6% of the planet's biodiversity within just 51,000 km².
whycr.card2_text: The only country in the Americas to abolish its army — over 75 years ago. Those resources now fund universal healthcare and world-class education.
whycr.card3_text: Latin America's most stable democracy, with world-class healthcare and a 99% literacy rate. Simply, the ideal place to invest and live.

about.title: About Us
about.pillar1: Since 2019, at the forefront of law in Costa Rica.
about.pillar2: The bridge between your goals and the potential of this country.
about.pillar3: Lasting relationships, built on trust and expertise.

services.title: Our Services
services.contratos_desc: We draft and review commercial, civil, and labor contracts with legal precision, protecting your interests in every clause.
services.familia_desc: Comprehensive advice on divorces, custody, inheritances, and marital property regimes, with sensitivity and professionalism.
services.penal_desc: Strategic criminal defense before the Costa Rican judiciary, ensuring the full exercise of your rights.
services.alertas_desc: Continuous monitoring of the National Registry to immediately notify you of any activity regarding your assets or properties.
services.nombre_desc: We protect your brand identity by registering your trade name and trademarks with the Intellectual Property Registry.
services.inmobiliario_desc: We guide every step of your real estate transactions: due diligence, deeds, surveys, and registry procedures.

visual.title: Clare Facio Visual
visual.subtitle: Educational videos on Costa Rican law and real estate — a resource for international investors and expatriates.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: We're ready to advise you. Send us a message and a member of our team will get back to you shortly.
